The ANC said that employee Errol Velile Present, who was fired for allegedly being involved in the cash-in-transit heist, had been suspended on Wednesday.
"The ANC has suspended four employees for their involvement in the robbery of a supermarket in Soweto," the party said in a statement.
"They include a security guard - who assisted the robbers - and two police officers."
Velile was one of the employees linked to the heist.
He was terminated on Wednesday, but the party did not say why.

Authorities in Bexar County, Texas, on Thursday responded to reports of three individuals with fatal gunshot wounds inside a gated community.

The incident occurred at about 8:46 p.m. at the gated community of Arleta Oaks, located in the 4900 block of River Oaks Drive, according to police spokesman Chris Villanueva.

Bexar County sheriff's deputies and officers from the Bexar County Sheriff's Office were on the scene within two minutes, Villanueva said.

Deputies arrested one man, who is in his 20s, and found two other individuals, who are in their 30s and 40s, with gunshot wounds inside a home.

They were transported to University Hospital in San Antonio, where they died, Villanueva said.

The BCSO's Homicide Unit is investigating the incident. Anyone with information related to the case may call the BCSO's non-emergency line at 210-335-8811.

College Basketball Power 10: Who Runs The Pac-12?

The Pac-12 is the conference to beat in college basketball this season.

With the Big East's demise and the ACC, Big Ten and SEC's seemingly imploding teams, the Pac-12 seems more likely to be the best in the country than ever before.

And it probably should be.

The Pac-12 has consistently produced the nation's top four teams for multiple seasons now, with the top three usually finishing in the top four of the AP Top 25.

Last year, the Pac-12 was so dominant, its only loss came against Oklahoma.

Yes, the rest of the country would love to see the Pac-12's dominance continue, but with the way it operates, it's hard to see how the conference could lose any more than one of its top teams.

I've assembled a list of the top 10 teams in the Pac-12 heading into the 2013-14 season, with the No. 1 team determined by a combination of points scored per game (PPP), assist average per game (A/A) and total points scored per game (TP).
